//: Deno config for the Supabase edge functions ONLY (the Next.js app uses tsconfig.json/npm and ignores this file). Its sole job is to make `deno test`/`deno check` run from the REPO ROOT resolve the shared import map — deno discovers its config from the CWD, and code in supabase/functions/_shared/ imports specifiers (`@std/tar/untar-stream`) that are otherwise only mapped in a single function's deno.json, so a from-root run couldn't resolve them and `npm run test:functions` silently failed type-checking. This is the UNION of every per-function deno.json's imports; the per-function configs still win for their own files (nearest-config discovery) and are what `supabase functions deploy` uses.
